name: bobbee
description: BobBee — AI-powered outbound planning and personalization for IBM sellers (Flask/Python backend, launched via npm).

scripts.start: (test -x .venv/bin/python3 || npm run setup) && .venv/bin/python3 -m flask --app wsgi:app run --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${BOBBEE_PORT:-5488}
scripts.check:js: for file in bobbee/static/js/*.js; do node --check "$file"; done
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run check:js
